plugins.name: vedix
plugins.description: Vedix — native agentic research workbench. Turns a topic into a venue-ready manuscript via cross-host CLI orchestration (Claude Code / Codex / Gemini / Antigravity). 17 specialized subagents, Source-Grounded Claim Architecture (SGCA) preventing LLM falsification, 23 publisher templates bundled, 7 languages first-class, BYOK as optional fallback.
